job_steps.acceptance: Exact collection machine provenance, package versions, renderer/GPU state, code commit, and config/backend hashes are recorded.
Every primary ManiSkill/SAPIEN task family writes renderer-backed RGB MP4s; diagnostic fallback media remain excluded.
job_steps.blocked_until: accepted render backend and shader pack are supplied on the collection machine

job_steps.acceptance: Pilot liveness reports pilot_runtime_ready=true, render_video_ready=true, runner_io_ready=true, records>=1, videos>=1, and zero diagnostic fallbacks.
job_steps.blocked_until: render-backed MP4 export works without diagnostic fallback media

job_steps.acceptance: Selected backend satisfies the runner contract, task configs, alias map, video writer, and metadata requirements before collection readiness is trusted.
job_steps.blocked_until: selected backend module exists and is the one to be used for official collection

job_steps.acceptance: Independent operator acceptance is materialized only after real platform, render-backed video readiness, paired replay, commit, and skill-library hash confirmations; rollout logs and manifest declaration are postcollection strict gates.
job_steps.blocked_until: all precollection operator fields are real, checkout/hash guards match, and render/liveness gates pass

job_steps.acceptance: Strict collection readiness passes with a specific run id, explicit alias unsealing, accepted fidelity, empty official output dirs, and real backend/config inputs.
job_steps.blocked_until: fidelity acceptance, explicit run id, unsealed aliases, backend module, and render-machine qualification are complete

job_steps.acceptance: Operator sheet, aliases, configs, candidate method-config hashes, method cutover checklist, manifest draft, runner files, and source audits are hash-locked before official collection.
job_steps.blocked_until: strict collection readiness passes and operator metadata is real

job_steps.acceptance: Official JSONL rows and renderer-backed MP4s are produced by the accepted backend under the accepted run id without diagnostic fallback promotion.
job_steps.blocked_until: ConfirmOfficialCollection switch, no placeholder fields, freeze receipt, and strict readiness pass

job_steps.acceptance: Raw JSONL logs, rollout videos, prepared configs, precollection receipt, and operator metadata are hash-sealed before manifest promotion.
job_steps.blocked_until: official collection produced complete logs/videos for the accepted run id

job_steps.acceptance: Sealed raw-log, video, config, precollection, and metadata hashes recompute without drift before manifest promotion.
job_steps.blocked_until: postcollection evidence seal exists for complete official artifacts

job_steps.acceptance: external_validation/manifest.json is written only from hash-sealed logs, videos, configs, methods, metrics, and release metadata.
External rollout metrics are recomputed from raw JSONL logs and MP4 paths under strict sample-count, video, pairing, and confidence gates.
job_steps.blocked_until: manifest contains real logs/videos/configs for the accepted run

job_steps.acceptance: Manifest-declared task configs exist, hash-match, and replace non-evidence templates under strict config evidence rules.
job_steps.blocked_until: manifest declares real configs and hashes

job_steps.acceptance: All non-oracle methods use manifest-declared independent implementations and checkpoint/config hashes rather than scaffolds or reference adapters.
job_steps.blocked_until: manifest declares independent method evidence for all required baselines

job_steps.acceptance: Paired-reset method panels are complete, unique, and consistent across task/config/method/hash identities.
job_steps.blocked_until: manifest-declared raw logs pass rollout recomputation

job_steps.acceptance: Release package recomputes manifest hashes and rejects internal, staged, diagnostic, fallback, empty-video, and non-MP4-like artifacts.
job_steps.blocked_until: manifest and postcollection hashes are complete

job_steps.acceptance: The final strict external evidence audit passes only when real/high-fidelity rollouts, configs, videos, methods, metrics, ablations, pairing, and release hashes satisfy all gates.
